entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Salesforce_Plan_Compilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningPlan PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="SalesForceApp" op="Create"/> </ProvisioningPlan>
